# Piyush Ahuja — WooCommerce & Next.js Developer

> Full-stack eCommerce developer serving clients worldwide (USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Europe). Specializing in custom WooCommerce stores with Next.js & Tailwind CSS, and native mobile apps for WooCommerce.

## Services

- **Custom WooCommerce Store with Next.js & Tailwind CSS**: Blazing-fast headless WooCommerce storefronts built with Next.js 14, React Server Components, and Tailwind CSS. Sub-second page loads, 95+ PageSpeed scores, full SEO optimization. [Order on Fiverr](https://www.fiverr.com/piyushahuja01/build-a-custom-woocommerce-store-with-next-js-tailwind-css-and-mobile-app)

- **WooCommerce to Native Mobile App**: Convert existing WooCommerce stores into custom-coded React Native mobile apps for iOS and Android. Push notifications, offline support, full cart & checkout, biometric login. [Order on Fiverr](https://www.fiverr.com/piyushahuja01/turn-your-woocommerce-store-into-a-custom-code-native-app)

- **eCommerce Consulting**: Architecture planning, performance audits, tech stack recommendations, and migration strategies for headless WooCommerce setups.

## About

Piyush Ahuja is a full-stack eCommerce developer with 5+ years of experience and 50+ projects delivered to clients in the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Germany, France, and 13+ countries worldwide. He specializes in:
- Headless WooCommerce with Next.js
- React Native mobile apps for WooCommerce
- Tailwind CSS eCommerce design
- Server-side rendering for SEO
- Payment gateway integration (Stripe, PayPal)
- TypeScript, Node.js, WordPress, Firebase

## FAQ

Q: How much does a custom WooCommerce store with Next.js cost?
A: Starting from $150 depending on complexity, pages, and integrations. Contact on Fiverr for a personalized quote.

Q: Can you convert an existing WooCommerce store into a mobile app?
A: Yes. I build custom-coded React Native apps for iOS and Android that sync with your WooCommerce backend.

Q: Why Next.js over traditional WordPress themes?
A: Next.js delivers 10x faster page loads, better SEO via server-side rendering, modern UI capabilities, and 95+ PageSpeed scores compared to typical WordPress themes scoring 25-45.

Q: How long does a WooCommerce mobile app take?
A: 2-4 weeks for a production-ready app with push notifications, payment integration, and full cart/checkout.

Q: Do you provide post-delivery support?
A: Yes. All projects include revision rounds and optional ongoing maintenance.
